text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... We must decide which movie to see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After bumping into Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku
Helios on our way home, we've come along to the
movie theater with them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, sorry to hit you up outta nowhere like that!
It's just, you're the expert for plays and movies
and stuff, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
If anyone can pick a bussin' movie to watch, it's
you! No cap! ☆
choice_data_list: You came here without choosing a movie first?
You came here without choosing a movie first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Weeell, like, there was one we were gonna see.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: But the second I stepped into this theater, I got mega hyped by all the posters and suddenly wanted to watch everything! I'm literally vibing with every film!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're quite right. This many motion pictures
showing at once is enough to get anybody
excited. Now, as for a film that the two of you
would like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: How about this one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With barely any hesitation whatsoever, Mejiro
Ardan points to a poster.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: OH-OH-OH—

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Daitaku
text_block_list.text: OH EM GEE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan chooses a musical that depicts the
life of a solitary musician who marched to the
beat of their own drum.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios absolutely
love it! We drop by a cafe afterwards so they can
chat about their favorite scenes...
choice_data_list: That really was a great movie!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That movie, like, high-key slapped! And that music at the climax! It hit so different! I almost cried.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For real! And that main character was so cool, like, the whole time. Had you already seen that movie before or something, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, that was my first time as well. I'm really glad
you all enjoyed it. ♪
choice_data_list: You sure picked that movie out fast, though...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Right?! How did you even do that?! It was just the kinda thing I wanted to see. Like I can't—I'm shook!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Well, the posters do offer a great deal of
information.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Like the film's director, for instance. This film's
director is incredibly skilled at utilizing the
soundtrack to invigorate their audience. I
expected you'd appreciate that, Helios.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And then there's the tagline, "True heroes play
outside the clef."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah... Yep, I like it. That's so the kinda tagline that'd hook me. Whoa! So I guess posters really do make it easy to choose!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! Can you give me a rundown of lit movies that'll get me pure hyped?! I just know you'll understand the assignment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'd be glad to. If you'd like to see more films
like the one today, I can recommend some from
the same director...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Do me! Do me! Do you know any other movies
with actors as lit as the one we just saw?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But of course. Hehe, I never expected all that
knowledge I gained from watching films alone in
bed would pay off to this extent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How do I put it? ...Hehe. I feel almost like I'm
being rewarded. I wouldn't mind more
opportunities like this, you know... ♪
choice_data_list: Okay, recommend some movies for me, too.
Okay, recommend some movies for me, too.

Maybe we should bring more people along next
time.

Maybe we should bring more people along next
time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How do I put it? ...Hehe. I feel almost like I'm
being rewarded. I wouldn't mind more
opportunities like this, you know... ♪
choice_data_list: Okay, recommend some movies for me, too.
Okay, recommend some movies for me, too.

Maybe we should bring more people along next
time.

Maybe we should bring more people along next
time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Certainly. In your case, Trainer, I believe films
about racing and whatnot would be best...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, I wanna see films like that, too! Hold on, your picks for us are dank and all, but I really wanna know what movies you like, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Totally! So, like, what do you usually watch? I'm guessing historical dramas and stuff like that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Me? Well... I am partial to a good period drama,
but I'm similarly fond of action and fantasy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. I never had you pegged as the fantasy
type!Have you seen this one? The picture book
was fire, so it got made into a movie...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They all end up chatting about movies for so long
that we barely make it back to the academy
before curfew.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day ends up being a very special one, as I get
to witness just how knowledgeable Mejiro Ardan
is about movies!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I... like that idea. What do the two of you think?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Now that would go hard! Let's do this for real! I'll get the fam together! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omg, this is going to be sweet! Where are we gonna do it? The dorm lobby? But then your trainer wouldn't be able to get in...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If memory serves, there's a very large
television in your office, isn't there, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Would you grant us permission to borrow your
office? That way, you could take part as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Thank you. ♪ Now... shall we set a date
and a lineup of movies for the event?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a few days later, the movie marathon is a
big success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing everyone enjoy themselves to the fullest,
Mejiro Ardan can't help smiling herself.
